name: Best Buddies Challenge - Tuesday Tuneup
description:
Join Best Buddies and ride leader, Teddy Shriver, for an interval workout and kick off your week the right way!

All riders will unlock our exclusive in-game kit, which will then be added to your Zwift Garage. Wear it proudly anytime you ride and spread the word about Best Buddies and the Best Buddies Challenges!

About Best Buddies

Best Buddies is the world’s largest organization dedicated to ending the social, physical and economic isolation of the 200 million people with intellectual and developmental disabilities (IDD). Our programs empower the special abilities of people with IDD by helping them form meaningful friendships with their peers, secure successful jobs, live independently, improve public speaking, self-advocacy and communication skills, and feel valued by society.

Challenge yourself to change lives at http://bestbuddieschallenge.org/

eventSubgroups.name: Best Buddies Challenge - Monday Mood Booster

name: The Grind Finale
description:
ABOUT THIS WORKOUT

This session aims to replicate the demands of a mountain bike ride / event. 

Mountain biking generally involves far more variations in effort compared with road riding - so plenty of surges and time spent being over geared! We also spend a lot of time on and off the power, so short spells going  hard to get over an obstacle, followed by a freewheel or very low power on a descent or little dip.

We touch upon all of these aspects in todays session, as we start off alternating every 30 seconds between riding hard at a low cadence, and riding easy - as if we are riding through an undulating single track. Then we make a ramp in effort, which finishes with a 30 second near max effort up a steep, rocky banking!

WORKOUT DESIGNER

Matt Rowe - Heavily involved in cycling for the past 25 years, Matt represented Great Britain at the Junior World Championships before graduating to the pro ranks. Matt draws on his extensive race experience to help amateur cyclists around the world achieve their personal goals. 

ABOUT GROUP WORKOUTS

Zwifters line up in the starting area just like a normal event and once the event starts, workout mode begins. Everyone stays together regardless of power output. That's right, if you're outputting 100W and another Zwifter is outputting 400W you will stay in exactly the same position relative to each other. Only if you stop pedaling and fall 6 meters behind the group will the rubber-banding stop. 

We highly recommend doing one of the FTP tests as the estimated FTP can be inaccurate and make the difficulty level of the workouts too high for your current fitness level. For more info on FTP go to: https://support.zwift.com/hc/en-us/articles/210208083-What-is-FTP-and-how-is-it-used-in-Zwift

eventSubgroups.name: The Grind Finale (E)
eventSubgroups.description: #zwiftofficial

name: Team Challenge for Crohn's & Colitis Ride
description:
Team Challenge is a group of people riding together to help fight against Crohn’s disease and ulcerative colitis, two painful, devastating and debilitating inflammatory bowel diseases.

This ride will vary each week on distance and route to bond our teammates that are training across the US. All are welcome! Especially if you believe in the mission to cure crohn’s disease and ulcerative colitis, while improving the quality of life for all who live with these diseases. We love to connect and ride with others who our riding to make every mile more meaningful.

Ride duration will be one hour and the pace will average around 15-18mph. Riders who want to exceed the prescribed pace may do so at anytime. The ride leader will aim to ride the allotted pace for the majority of the session.

You can learn more about Team Challenge and the Crohn’s and Colitis Foundation at http://www.ccteamchallenge.org or http://www.crohnscolitisfoundation.org

#teamchallenge

eventSubgroups.name: Team Challenge for Crohn's & Colitis Ride (E)

name: Zwift Women's Training Club Workout
description:
Welcome to the Zwift Women’s Training Club workouts! 

ZWTC is your community for fun and fitness. Our weekly workouts will take you through some of Zwift’s most popular training plans, and with the flexibility to join in any time, regardless of where we are in the plan! Get the most out of your Zwifting with training designed by world-class coaches, like 3x Olympic Gold medalist, Kristin Armstrong!

The group workouts will be held every 3 hours UTC on Tuesdays and Thursdays. We’ll also offer recovery rides every 3 hours on Wednesdays - be on the look out for special guests joining those! Our main goal is to provide you with a consistent experience week in and week out, to challenge yourself in a supportive group setting, making friends and getting fit along the way! 

Join the Zwift Women’s Training Club to connect with new ride friends, ask questions, and get advice from experts.  https://www.zwift.com/clubs/ZwiftWTC/join

Love these workouts? Check out the club for more opportunities to train with us! We offer social rides every 3 hours on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays in addition to the Tuesday/Thursday workouts.

name: CAF Ride
description:
Join the Challenged Athletes Foundation on their weekly ride, every Tuesdays at 7:10am PT. You can join the group on discord for Q&A: https://discord.gg/geCAgqnNyr 

On this ride, you’ll learn more about Steven Peace, 16 years tenure Navy Veteran, who became 1 of only 3 people in the United States to competitively ride the upright tricycle. Since he began riding, Steven has won Para-Cycling US Nationals (9 times), medaled in UCI World Cups (30 times), and competed in UCI World Championships (8 times)

The Challenged Athletes Foundation strives to provide opportunities and support to people with physical and visual disabilities, so they can pursue active lifestyles through physical fitness and competitive athletics. The CAF Cycling Club is a year-round local club in San Diego, the Bay Area, Idaho, and remotely which provides adaptive athletes and non-adaptive athletes the opportunity to ride anywhere in the world and be a part of #TeamCAF. Membership includes a free cycling jersey, monthly email information, sponsor and CAF discounts, a supportive cycling community and more! 

Join the CAF Zwift Cycling Club: https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/CAFZwiftClub/join
Register for the CAF Cycling Club: https://www.challengedathletes.org/caf-cycle-club/

Follow CAF 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cafoundation/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CAForg/
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/CAFoundation 

#caf #adaptivesports

name: Stage 3: Zwift Games: Cobbled Crown
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: Team DRAFT Tuesday Race
description:
Welcome to the Tuesday Race brought to you by Team DRAFT!
We encourage that all participants head over to zwiftpower.com and register. For more information see: https://zwiftinsider.com/zwiftpower-signup/ Riders who have not completed the Zwiftpower registration will not be included in the official race results. We also ask that your Zwift activities be saved publicly, and that you open and maintain a Strava account to allow for organizer analysis. Any rider exhibiting questionable performance during a the race may be disqualified.

RULES:
- No zPower riders.
- Heart rate monitors mandatory for all categories
- 5min and 20min CEVAZ limits apply. Riding in the wrong category will lead to disqualification.

RACE CATEGORIES:
A: 4.0 W/kg to 5.0 W/kg
B: 3.2 W/kg to 3.99 W/kg
C: 2.5 W/kg to 3.19 W/kg
D: Under 2.49 W/kg

name: Le Col SUB6 Endurance Series
description: Starting on Tuesday 22nd October at 06:30 MST, join RAAM World Record Holder Lucas Clarke for the Le Col SUB6 Endurance Series on Zwift. These weekly sessions are crafted to help you develop your endurance capacity.  Whether you’re preparing for ultra-distance events like Race Across America (RAAM), Transcontinental and Mallorca 312, aiming for your first ultra or looking to refine your training, this series is your key to mastering endurance.

name: US Military Endurance Sports Fun Run
description: Welcome to the US Military Endurance Sports weekly “Fun Run”. this is a run at your own pace event that will explore different Zwift worlds weekly at varying distances and/or times. The leader typically starts at a 9:15 pace with added increments at a faster pace along the way. Our goal is to provide a platform for all to enjoy while increasing awareness about the USMES organization which is an endurance-based team of Activeduty military, veterans including friends and family. Activity Duty members are encouraged to place *USMES* in their Zwift name and to check out our Facebook Group at UZR2- USMES Zwift Ride and Run. #FitForDutyFitForLife

eventSubgroups.name: US Military Endurance Sports Fun Run (E)

name: Lance Watson's Champion Intervals
description:
Join this custom designed interval workout by Hall of Fame Coach Lance Watson! Accomplish the same style of workout Coach Watson prescribed to win Ironman, Olympic Gold, and countless age group championships. Our Tuesday rides focus on threshold work to ensure quality Zone 4 energy zones are part of your training week. This challenging 60 minute ride is live-coached by Lance and is guaranteed to make you a stronger cyclist. The rides are banded and all levels are welcome - we’ll all stick together.

About Lance Watson: Lance Watson is a Triathlon Hall of Fame coach who has coached at numerous World Championships and four Olympic Games. An Ironman Master Coach, Lance specializes in coaching athletes of all abilities with busy life schedules who want the most out of their available training time. Lance is the founder and owner of LifeSport Coaching in Victoria, Canada and the innovator behind Lance Watson’s TRiCLUB, the first online club that offers structured team workouts and live, interactive coaching sessions using Zoom and Zwift. For more information visit www.lifesportcoaching.com. For a free coaching consult, book a call at https://calendly.com/lifesport-triclub/30min

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: SWX Sweet Spot Tuesday by Coach Cindy
description:
Build strength and stamina every Tuesday with SWX Sweet Spot — a high-quality interval session designed to improve endurance and cycling performance.
Created by Coach Cindy (Train Smart = Race Stronger), this session targets the sweet spot between tempo and threshold — the perfect balance of challenge and sustainability. Bring focus, consistency, and strong legs!

• All levels welcome
• Stay-together mode enabled
• Late join allowed

Connect and learn more about who we are:
📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/shark_worx_swx
🌐 Website: https://bit.ly/Visit_Coach_Cindy

eventSubgroups.name: SWX Sweet Spot Tuesday by Coach Cindy (E)

name: EVO CC Sprint Race Series
description:
Welcome to EVO sprintrace series. Shorter more compact races for the rider looking for an effective high intensity race. Start fast, hang on in the middle, then sprint for the win at the finish. Expect to push your heart rate to its maximum. Sprinkle a few of these into your training plan and watch your fitness grow.

To make racing as fair as possible we have enforced a few minor rules that will result in automatic disqualification on ZwiftPower.

All riders must wear a heart rate monitor
Riding in an incorrect category.

zPower riders will be disqualified in A, B, and C Podium. zPower is allowed in the D category. Race details and final results will be available at www.zwiftpower.com

#evo

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp with Mathieu van der Poel
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

eventSubgroups.name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp with Mathieu van der Poel (E)

name: ZTPL Cycling Club with Handbikers Training Session
description:
ZTPL Cycling Club wraz Dawidem RatajCyclistCoach https://www.instagram.com/ratajcyclistcoach/ ma przyjemność zaprosić na jedyny w swoim rodzaju event treningowy, przygotowany przez Dawida, parakolarza, jeżdżącego na handbike'u 💪🚴‍♂️♿️✅
Dołączcie do niego i budujcie razem formę!

Event będzie polegał na wspólnych sesjach treningowych, a w każdy ostatni event w miesiącu będzie, treningiem sprawdzającym czyli 30min TIME TRIAL Training ♿️🔥💪🚴‍♂️
Tetraplegicy, paraplegicy - Wszyscy znajdą tu coś dla siebie!!!

Będziemy wspólnie budować formę na nowy sezon 2024 📊📈🚴‍♂️♿️

ZTPL Cycling Club, together with Dawid (RatajCyclistCoach) – https://www.instagram.com/ratajcyclistcoach/ – is excited to invite you to a one-of-a-kind training event designed by Dawid, a para-cyclist riding a handbike 💪🚴‍♂️♿️✅

name: DBR Tuesday Race
description:
Welcome to DBR Tuesday Race.
All will start with 1 minute between RS categories. Expect each race to be highly competitive and have fun.
Categories
Each race will be using Zwift Racing Score (ZRS) for categorization.
race up a category, if your RS is at the top end of a category. Or if you simply desire an added challenge.
- A: 1000 =< 690
- B:690<520
- C:520<350
- D:350<180
- E:180<=0
Your Zwift Racing Score is determined by how much success you have in races.
better against people with higher ZRS, then your ZRS may increase. If you place worse than people with lower ZRS, then your score might decrease. Read more about ZRS here - https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh <https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh>
If your ZRS increases past a category boundary during the series, your points earned will not transfer to the new category with you.
RULES:
Smart trainer or power meter is required. zPower will be removed.
Heart rate monitors are compulsory for all categories.
No TT bikes unless it's a TT event.
You need to have a registered account with Zwiftpower.com and accept their terms and conditions to be in the results of the race.
Misc.
Race organizers may request riders in all categories to provide a dual recording or a matching RL effort (Strava) in order to verify a Zwift race effort. Failure to comply may result in disqualification from the event. Failure to provide a dual recording or RL effort on three requests may result in disqualification from future events, until a dual recording with a matching effort is provided.
Race organizers may exclude a rider from the results, due to poor sportsmanship. Examples may be bad language, sandbagging or other behavior of a disruptive manner.

#danishbikeriders

name: Epic Run Crew: Tuesday Trot
description:
You survived Monday! Let’s make Tuesday terrific by joining us for a friendly social run.
This is a 45 minute group run. You are welcome to run at your own pace (AYOP). Chatting is encouraged! Talk about food. Make a funny observation. Whatever. We don’t judge. Just have some fun!
Epic Run Crew is based in Vancouver, BC, Canada. We were founded as an in-person club in 2021 and then joined Zwift in June 2022.
Use the Zwift Companion app to join the Epic Run Crew club, for access to exclusive member-only group runs.
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/epicruncrew2/
Instagram: @epicruncrew

name: Dubai Roadsters Club ride
description: This is a fast paced, fun ride at the top end of the C category. It is not a race, just a pacey bit of fun. The average speed for the ride is aprx 40kph and the average watts/kilo is 2.9 to 3.0 each week, although the nature of the lumpy Central Park course can cause this to spike a couple of times each lap. The focus of the ride is to have fun and enjoy riding in a fast moving peloton.

name: Braunstein Cycling Club Danish Group Ride
description:
This is a social group workout; a chance every week for members to get together from around the globe, ride, chat and support each other - it’s run as a group workout session with ‘keep everyone together’ enabled so no matter what your pace you’ll stay in the pack - it’s not a race or competition and open for anyone to join us.

WHO IS THE BCC?

The BRAUNSTEIN Cycling Club (BCC) is, as the name suggests, Braunstein brewery’s Cycling Club. The BCC is a danish social Cycling club were we share our passion for Cycling.

For more information head to: www.braunstein.dk/bcc2

RIDE LEADERS

The rides are led by our friendly team of member ride leaders. The Leader (who has a yellow beacon over their head) will ride at a steady pace as set by the workout session. On most occasions we will have a support ride leader (who will also have a beacon), the ride leaders are there to help support you and keep the banter going - to join the chat use the Zwift Companion smartphone app.

Map/Route — Wattopia
Distance/Time/Laps — 1 hour
Type of Event - Group Ride
ABOUT GROUP WORKOUTS

Zwifters line up in the starting area just like a normal event and once the event starts, workout mode begins. Everyone stays together regardless of power output. Only if you stop pedaling and fall 6 meters behind the group will the rubber-banding stop.

eventSubgroups.name: Braunstein Cycling Club Danish Group Ride (E)

name: Outseason Tuesdays with Endurance Nation
description:
Transform Your Winter with Endurance Nation’s OutSeason Program!

Get ready to build next-level fitness with our 9-week OutSeason cycling series! Join us every Tuesday and Thursday for a focused, one-hour session designed to boost your strength, endurance, and power. With just two workouts per week, you’ll start building winter strength that will prepare you to reach your goals next season. This program is tried-and-true, with over 10,000 athletes using it to succeed in cycling and triathlon for over 16 years.

Why settle for base miles alone when you can add targeted intensity this winter? Join Endurance Nation and see what a season of smart training can do. Discover more about the OutSeason at www.endurancenation.us/zwift.

Love these workouts? Check out the club for more opportunities to train with us! We offer social rides on Saturdays, Sundays and Mondays each week — they are great alternates to these scheduled workouts!

name: Group Run 10k
description:
Join us for a 10k group run.   It's run-at-your-own-pace and all are welcome! 

Pick the closest pace group for you, but all groups will start together and you are free to fall back and run ahead. The pace groups designate average pace for the duration of the run. Most groups will start slower and finish faster than the indicated pace. Feel free to mix in some intervals and race your friends. #pbt

name: Stage 4: Zwift Games: Peaky Pave
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: Yas Cycles Community Ride
description:
Abu Dhabi Community Ride.
Last 10 minutes effort is above 3.5wkg. If riders can't stay with the group on last 10 minutes effort, please ride the last ten at a pace you're most comfortable with.

name: Stanga Racing after work crit
description:
Shake off the workday with the Stanga Racing After Work Crit. Short, sharp and full gas from the gun – expect 20–30 minutes of surges, corners and sprint finishes with the Stanga crew. Join your category, hold your line, and race fair. This is all about hard efforts, clean racing and good vibes. Grab your best crit setup, warm up well, and let’s see who clocks out on top.

Like this format? Join the Stanga Racing club on Zwift for our full weekly schedule of crits, punchy races, and endurance rides.

https://www.zwift.com/clubs/12f0e125-1fb8-4d78-8da2-b39efca4bffb/home

name: T-VGN 🌱 Tornado
description: Welcome to Team Vegan’s Tornado! This is a chance to test yourself with race events each week. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

name: Dusk Patrol Run
description:
DESCRIPTION

Join Utah-based marathon runner Jordan Maddocks who will lead a 45-60 minute speed session.

Welcome to Dusk Patrol 'Zwift Academy Run' Edition. Each week we will do a speed workout from the 2020 Zwift Academy Run catalog (catalog can be found in the training folder on the home screen). We will do one of the 8 workouts each week in chronological order every Tuesday at 7AM Mountain / 9AM Eastern. Each workout ranges between 45-60 min. These workouts were built to help strengthen athletes of all abilities and help build for race day. All of the workouts use your 10K speed bias setting in Zwift -- this pace time can be adjusted in settings to increase/decrease level of difficulty. Need More Speed? If you're looking for an additional speed workout during the week you're welcome to join us for Thursday Dusk Patrol which starts at same time (8:30AM MT/10:30AM ET).

ABOUT

ABOUT Jordan Maddocks
I'm a low 2:30's marathoner fighting out of Draper, Utah, USA. I’ve been running for over 15 years. Running is my passion, It's what keeps me centered and where I find solace. I love coaching and assisting others in setting their fitness goals and achieving them. I've been hosting Dusk Patrol on Zwift for over three years. When I'm not training I'm spending time with my momma bear and two cubs. Running has the magical ability to assist others in finding their greatness and I hope I can share that journey with you.

name: Good Time Riders - TT Race
description:
Test yourself over a different 10-mile TT route each week.

Good Time Riders are a group of online friends who offer range of weekly
group rides, workouts and races, where enjoyment is key. Find us on Zwift
Clubs, Discord and Facebook

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: GXY LOW LOOSEY GOOSEY [1.4-1.8 WKG] CAT D
description:
Welcome to GXY Low Loosey Goosey!

This is our beginner/recovery social spin. We ride as a team, and stay together throughout the ride.

The aim of this ride is to welcome newcomers to Zwift and those wanting a recovery ride to enjoy a chilled 60 minutes of fun and support. This can also be used as a warm up prior to racing. 

GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed. We are looking forward to riding with you.

If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally via our Facebook link or by the email below:

https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/
https://www.strava.com/clubs/989894
https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

Email:

name: ZLDR Workout Tuesday
description: Let's work, suffer, and have fun together.

name: The Herd Gallops
description:
Looking to push the pace a little before The Herd's Tuesday Social? All are welcome to join The Herd on this supportive and social event.  Respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. Although this is a faster paced ride, it is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back.                                                                                 

The average pace for the ride with be 2.7-3.2 but will go up to 3.5-4WKG on climbs.

This season we will ramp up the pace every 3 weeks throughout the winter until we reach the goal of 2.7-3.2 for a hour. 

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/Dr7ZtPV (Please use Push-To-Talk) 
Check us out on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zHerd/

name: Cycle Nation Joburg Sundowner
description:
Welcome to the Cycle Nation Joburg Sundowner Ride. Join us for an easy evening social ride.

Your co-operation is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that all riders respect the pace set by the ride leader (yellow beacon).

This is not a race and we encourage you to stay with the ride leader (yellow beacon) and if you are feeling strong you are more than welcome to assist with sweeping duties at the back of the ride helping dropped riders rejoin the group. We're looking forward to hosting you for the a ride.

Join our Facebook Group: https://bit.ly/38TTtAh
Join our Zwift Team: https://bit.ly/3D2Q4zL
Join our Strava Club: https://bit.ly/3pEDkFM
Twitter: https://bit.ly/3n4uhft
Instagram: https://bit.ly/3pEsdN6

name: MHG Run Club
description:
Back in January 2021, Eddie Izzard ran 32 marathons in 31 days. Our community rallied together and joined the action all month long. This inspired us to create the MHG Run Club, which continues Eddie’s incredible efforts of making humanity great.

The MHG Run Club motivates and supports everybody, whether you’re looking for tips to achieve your training goals or looking for a group to bond and socialize with. A light-minded Zwift treadmill runners group, for runners of all abilities, friendly chat and a good laugh :)

Please feel free to join me Clive Finnimore with our official MHG Run Club Lunchtime 5K @ 8KPH on Monday, Wednesday & Fridays, See you there soon :)

Please also join us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/252358412942586/
Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/MHGA
Keep on Running

name: Film My Run 500 with NoblePro
description:
Join Stephen Cousins and NoblePro for a 500 metre climb. Set your treadmill to 12% incline and run 4.2km of distance to reach 500 metres elevation. If your treadmill doesn't go that high, set it as high as it will go and join us anyway!

The run will be progressive starting at a walking pace of 5kph rising to 7kph for the final kilometre. Get on to the balls of your toes and get your calf muscles to do the work. This continuous uphill effort will help build strength and endurance for those hilly trail runs

This event is sponsored by the ever popular Noble Pro treadmills. You can get a discount on a NoblePro SMART treadmill from this link https://zwift.run/noble-pro

You can watch the run on the live stream at http://youtube.com/ZwiftRunChannel

Join the FMR Run Club for more fun events at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/6afca04c-8fac-4ffa-b700-f27a73d7f3dd/join

name: Sydkysten Race
description: This race is powered by Sydkysten Cycling / Carl Ras, Expect the race to be highly competitive across all CATs. In order to make the racing as fair as possible all racers on zPower, must wear heart rate. We hope that everyone gets a great HIIT workout and has some good fun in this race.

name: Zwift Women's Training Club Workout
description:
Welcome to the Zwift Women’s Training Club workouts! 

ZWTC is your community for fun and fitness. Our weekly workouts will take you through some of Zwift’s most popular training plans, and with the flexibility to join in any time, regardless of where we are in the plan! Get the most out of your Zwifting with training designed by world-class coaches, like 3x Olympic Gold medalist, Kristin Armstrong!

The group workouts will be held every 3 hours UTC on Tuesdays and Thursdays. We’ll also offer recovery rides every 3 hours on Wednesdays - be on the look out for special guests joining those! Our main goal is to provide you with a consistent experience week in and week out, to challenge yourself in a supportive group setting, making friends and getting fit along the way! 

Join the Zwift Women’s Training Club to connect with new ride friends, ask questions, and get advice from experts.  https://www.zwift.com/clubs/ZwiftWTC/join

Love these workouts? Check out the club for more opportunities to train with us! We offer social rides every 3 hours on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays in addition to the Tuesday/Thursday workouts.

name: Operation 5.W.4.T -  FTP Test
description:
Joignez les membres 5.W.4.T pour un entrainement axé sur le développement du FTP (Functional Threshold Power). 

Rejoignez-nous pour une séance d'entraînement stimulante conçue pour améliorer votre puissance aérobie et votre endurance!
Mode élastique activé.

Suivez-nous sur Facebook pour rester informé de nos autres événements : http://fb.5W4T.com
À bientôt! 
L'Équipe 5.W.4.T

name: Team Africa Rising
description:
The Team Africa Rising Zwift Ride showcases our efforts in African cycling development. On this ride, you may be joined by some of our African cyclists from around the continent including Benin, Sierra Leone, Rwanda, DRC (Congo), and Uganda. Enjoy all the different African flags! You may even ride with former Rwandan Olympian (2012/2016) and World Tour cyclist (Team DiData), Adrien Niyonshuti.

We use this ride as a training and recovery ride for our African cyclists. We have Benin coaches who use this ride to train new Benin cyclists on how to shift, stay with the peloton and establish a consistent pedal stroke. So, you’ll be part of history during this ride! This event is run by members of Team Africa Rising, Adrien Niyonshuti, and all the up-and-coming coaches and cyclists of Benin and other countries to help them better learn to engage with fans and other riders. Sometimes we’ll have guest leads to talk to you about our work with Team Africa Rising.

The ride will remain a D+/C- ride. The team will adhere to the 1.5 - 2.0 w/kg range. The lead will ride at the top end, the sweep will ride at the lower end and will help riders if they want to make it back to the pack.

On this ride, we encourage chatting as it teaches the riders English. YOU will be a part of helping these young men and women build and lead their own rides. How cool is that?

You can follow us on our Facebook Page: https://www.facebook.com/groups/teamafricarising

Learn more about Team Africa Rising on our website: https://teamafricarising.org

name: Love Riding's 2.0wkg Coffee Ride
description:
Welcome to the Love Riding Club’s Coffee Ride! We meet every Tuesday for a casual, conversational
ride at a pace that falls within most people’s Zone 2 range (average pace between 1.8 – 2.2 wkg). We
are a friendly bunch and conversation is encouraged as it’s a great way to make sure you’re not going
too hard!
Sprinting is encouraged as long as you can make your way back to the group in time.
Tip: If you are new to sprints, it is best to sprint from the back of the pack to take advantage of the draft
and you won’t go out too far ahead of the group!

The lead yellow beacon will maintain the average advertised pace and the sweep red beacon will help
those who fall behind to catch up with the main group. We welcome riders who feel strong or want a
challenge to help the sweep team so please just shout up in the chat!

We tend to run the fence to help keep the group together, this will be relaxed at the sprints.
Please respect the lead beacon and make the effort to stay as close as possible to him/her for the benefit
of the whole group.

We LOVE to ride and we LOVE Coffee Rides! Looking forward to seeing you all on Tuesdays,
whether you’re warming up for a race, recovering, or just getting into cycling and this is at your
challenge level. We welcome you all!

Join us on Facebook to continue the chat, provide feedback and take part in how the club shapes in the
future.
https://www.facebook.com/groups/5437161913060756/

or Join our Zwift Club
Love Riding Club – find us in the club search
Find out events by filtering #loveriding

name: Ca Va Fumer Bleu
description:
Le mode élastique favorise la cohésion au sein du groupe, permettant à chacun d’exprimer pleinement ses compétences. Ainsi, les défis ne deviennent plus des obstacles, mais plutôt des occasions de partage convivial et de plaisir collectif, transformant l’effort en une expérience enrichissante.

Discutez sur Discord /  Discuss on Discord: https://discord.gg/HgFb6SThT
Notre Facebook: https://m.facebook.com/groups/907351331715445

"Please add “(Gang)” at the end of your username in your Zwift profile.   Merci de mettre (Gang) à la fin de votre pseudo dans votre profil zwift 
"
Ruberband mode encourages group cohesion, allowing everyone to fully express their abilities.      Challenges are no longer obstacles, but opportunities for friendly sharing and collective enjoyment, turning effort into a truly rewarding experience.

name: BRAUNSTEIN X VELOFIT CRIT SERIES
description:
Der er intet, der slår en helhjertet indsats på en tirsdag, så find din indre styrke - det bliver en fest, og gør dig klar til at give den alt. Vinderne kan prale indtil den følgende uge
 
Tilmeld dig vores Zwift klub BRAUNSTEIN X VELOFIT CYCLING CLUB her https://www.zwift.com/eu/clubs/417736f7-4abb-44e9-a6eb-75ec8f01b594/home
 
Det er tid til Race! Kom og vær med til sjov på en række korte ruter med flere omgange. Gør dig klar til at grave dybt og presse dig selv til målstregen!
 
Rute: Crit City
Omgang Distance: 1,9 km
 
Kategorier:
A: 4,0 - 5,0 w/kg - 15 omgange
B: 3,2 - 3,9 w/kg - 12 omgange
C: 2,5 - 3,1 w/kg - 10 omgange
D: 1,0 - 2,49 w/kg - 8 omgange
 
Hvordan låser jeg op for BCC Kittet?
 
Ikke nok med at du vil repræsentere kittet under begivenheden, men hvis du fuldfører nogen af vores ugentlige ture, låser du op for BCC Kittet i din garage, så du med stolthed kan bære BCC designet på enhver tur.
 
HVAD ER ZWIFT POWER? For yderligere oplysninger om at forbinde til Zwift Power, tjek denne supportside: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H
 
Bemærk venligst; for at dine resultater vises i Zwift Power, skal du bruge et pulsmåler (HRM) og køre på en smart træner, smart cykel, eller bruge en effektmåler.
 
Om Braunstein Cycling Club:
Braunstein Bryggeriets Cykelklub er et blomstrende fællesskab af cykelentusiaster baseret i Køge og online på Zwift. Med mere end 500 medlemmer forener klubben cykelglæde og socialt samvær, både på de fysiske veje og i den virtuelle verden. Klubbens engagement i at skabe et varmt og indbydende miljø er åbenlyst, og det sociale aspekt vægtes lige så højt som den fysiske træning. Medlemmerne kan nyde samværet og den fælles passion for cykling, hvilket gør Braunstein Bryggeriets Cykelklub til et unikt og positivt samfund for cykelentusiaster. Besøg: braunstein.dk
 
Om Velofit:
Velofit specialiserer sig i kvalitet og personlig service inden for cykling. Vi tilbyder skræddersyede løsninger som bikefit, træningstest, cykelrejser og kvalitetscykeltøj, alt sammen akkompagneret af god kaffe. Vores erfarne team står klar til at vejlede cykelentusiaster på alle niveauer og skabe et unikt cykelfællesskab i Aarhus.
 
Hold dig opdateret med de seneste BCC ture, cykelevents og se, hvem der topper leaderboardet hver uge. Tjek vores fællesskab ud ved at melde dig ind i vores BCC Strava Klub: https://www.strava.com/clubs/bccdk, følg med på vores Facebook-side: https://www.facebook.com/braunsteincyclingclub eller få det nyeste direkte i dit feed via: https://www.instagram.com/braunstein_bcc/

name: Stage 5: Zwift Games: Three Step Sisters | Advanced
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Champs Elysees
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: The Break Away Ride
description:
🐝 QUEENBEE LADIES — The Break Away Ride  
Banded • Social • Strong Together

It’s time to break away, QueenBees!
 Whether you're sneaking out from behind the work desk at lunchtime, leading off the front (yes, even when we’re banded!), or escaping the grip of a harsh northern winter, this ride is your reset button.

For our southern sisters, it’s your break away from slumber — a bright kick-start to the day with good energy, good watts, and great company.

Join us for a supportive banded ride where no one gets dropped, everyone keeps moving, and we all break away from something… stress, cold, or the doona.
Come ride, reset, and buzz stronger together.

name: 3R PedalPlay EVOLVE Interval Ride [~2.9-3.2 w/kg avg]
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that no riders ride off the front of the group. The event is designed as part of 3R’s package of #ProStyleTraining events to assist with the attainment of your training goals and may include intervals over and below the ride average parameters. This is not a race so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack. We welcome good banter and aim to create a fun, social atmosphere for your training. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ 

#Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise #3r

name: ZLDR No One Left Behind
description:
Come join ZLDR for a nice go AYOP (at your own pace) event. All participants whether running or walking are encourage to participate. Our leads will be taking this time to walk and chat and basically encourage the heck out of you to just keep moving regardless your pace!

ZLDR is a group of diverse people, from speed demons to walkers, from people just getting to their first 5k to ultra runners. We are here to support your on-foot dreams and help you develop your running/walking skills. We are a collective group of supportive and experienced runners and walkers who want to help you set and achieve new goals!

For more ZLDR fun and support, join our groups on social media platforms:

Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/ZLDR2020
Strava Club: https://www.strava.com/clubs/zldr2020
Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/zldr.2020/
Discord Invitation (not required for the run)
https://discord.com/invite/PuFctEnWynq

name: T-VGN 🌱 Tempeh of Seitan
description: Get ready to push yourself with Team Vegan as we bring you a variety of weekly workouts. Share the effort with a group of like-minded riders who’ll stay together for the duration of the exercise. Jump on and let us help you get fitter / faster / stronger.

name: BST Mountaingoat iTT
description:
This hill climb TT is a race without draft, but bike can be
freely chosen. The race is for everyone who wants a good, high quality
workout and competition with likeminded people. Remember to pace yourself,
there will be a climb to conquer. The race should be as fair as possible so
the following rules apply. Racers on zPower, lacking heart rate monitors,
riding in an inappropriate category, or riding very unrealistically will be
disqualified. Powerups are turned off as well. Final results will be
available on zwiftpower.com. So get your bottles and turn on your fan, get
ready for some great fun! When you sign up please select the correct
category below (your FTP divided by your weight in kg):
(A) 4.0+ W/kg FTP
(B) 3.2 - 3.99 W/kg FTP
(C) 2.5 - 3.19 W/kg FTP
(D) 0 - 2.49 W/kg FTP
(E) Women Only

name: TCB Training Ride
description: This weekly training ride is not a coached session but designed for you to use as an excellent interval session. A hard effort on the hills then regroup with people riding a similar pace to recover on the flat and then go again. If you want to ride a more social pace that is fine too but it’s a great way of adding in a fun and competitive interval session to your Zwifting week.

name: Turn It Up Tuesdays
description:
Welcome to Turn It Up Tuesdays. Whether you’re a new runner getting into fitness, an experienced runner who wants to compete for a new personal best, or an athlete craving a great workout alongside an awesome crew of fellow athletes, these weekly structured workouts promise up-tempo runs that’ll boost you up and help you achieve your running goals. 

#turnituptuesday #tiut

name: Group Run 5k
description:
DESCRIPTION

Join us for a 5k group run.   It's run-at-your-own-pace and all are welcome! 

Pick the closest pace group for you, but all groups will start together and you are free to fall back and run ahead. The pace groups designate average pace for the duration of the run. Most groups will start slower and finish faster than the indicated pace. Feel free to mix in some intervals and race your friends.

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: GXY - RIDE THE RAINDOW GROUP WORKOUT RIDE (CAT E)
description:
THIS EVENT IS DESIGNED WITH YOU, THE INDIVIDUAL IN MIND.

PLEASE HAVE YOUR COLOURED POWER GRAPH UNLOCKED AT THE START OF THE EVENT.

THE LEADER WILL TAKE YOU THROUGH A RAINBOW OF POWER SUGGESTIONS. YOUR OBJECTIVE IS TO MATCH THESE AS ACCURATELY AS POSSIBLE THROUGHOUT THE EVENT.

GOOD LUCK AND FEEL FREE TO SHARE YOUR GRAPH AFTER!

Please respect the leader’s power suggestions and bring your best banter and fun.
Expect riders NOT to ride together as they all ride to their own ability based on their own FTP.
This event does NOT have drafting enabled and may have enforced bikes selected.

GXY is an open and inclusive cycling club. Whether you ride socially, race, train with intent, or mix it up you're always welcome.

Here, together.

https://discord.com/channels/922817854372478986/1472223737129730110

If you'd like to join our community you can find us here;
https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/

https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

name: CMC/NamZ Tuesday ZRL Practice Race
description:
Over the next 4 weeks, we will follow the race courses used in the Zwift Racing League. If you haven't had a chance to take part in this week's event, or your team rota is sitting you out for the week, please come and join us!
 
We take part in both the Zwift Racing League and the Thursday TTT events. If you want to join our club - WhatsApp Mario 27832661937

name: The HERD Tuesday Social
description:
New to Zwift, just a little out of shape or recovering from injury? This is the group ride for you! All are welcome to join The Herd on this supportive and social event.

Respect the leader's pace and ride with the yellow beacon. This is NOT A RACE! Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling in the back.

WE DO RUN THE FENCE! The fence is in place to ensure that new group riders don't get caught up with the flyers and have a bad experience. Bear in mind that the fence will move due to changes in speed on the inclines. We ask that you always ride with the yellow beacon. Please pay attention to messages from the ride leader regarding fence intervals and when to regroup.

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/Dr7ZtPV (Please use Push-To-Talk)
Check us out on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/groups/zHerd/

name: RCC Global Club Ride
description:
WELCOME TO THE RAPHA CYCLING CLUB WORLD WIDE GROUP RIDE. 

This is a social group workout; a chance every week for members to get together from around the globe, ride, chat and support each other - it’s run as a group workout session with ‘keep everyone together’ enabled so no matter what your pace you’ll stay in the pack - it’s not a race or competition and open for anyone to join us. 

We host 4 rides every week on a Tuesday to suit different time zones around the world (aimed at evenings), join whichever time works best for you. 
 
WHO IS THE RCC?
 
The Rapha Cycling Club (RCC) is, as the name suggests, Rapha’s Cycling Club. The RCC exists to help connect like minded riders from all over the world, underpinned by Rapha’s products and experiences. We ride together across continents and here united within Zwift. 
 
For more information head to: www.Rapha.cc/rcc
 
RIDE LEADERS
 
The rides are led by our friendly team of member ride leaders from around the world.  The Leader (who has a yellow beacon over their head) will ride at a steady pace as set by the workout session. Prompts will appear on screen set by the workout designer Matt Rowe so you know what to do throughout the ride. On most occasions we will have a support ride leader (who will also have a beacon), the ride leaders are there to help support you and keep the banter going - to join the chat use the Zwift Companion smartphone app. 
 
ABOUT GROUP WORKOUTS
 
Zwifters line up in the starting area just like a normal event and once the event starts, workout mode begins. Everyone stays together regardless of power output. That's right, if you're outputting 100W and another Zwifter is outputting 400W you will stay in exactly the same position relative to each other. Only if you stop pedaling and fall 6 meters behind the group will the rubber-banding stop.
 
ABOUT THIS WORKOUT

Today's workout contains 4 x 6 minute blocks of Zone 3, with some surges thrown in for good measure! The Zone 3 riding should feel nice and comfortable, however the surges may sting a little. The surges in each block are only 20 seconds long, but at 110% of FTP so require a focused increase in effort .At the end of each 6 minute block, there is a 1 minute 'Free Ride' - this is your chance to turn an endurance based session into something special! Come event day or when riding with friends, it's likely you want some more power for that final sprint to the cafe right? Give it 100% in each 60 second Free Ride section to help you become more explosive! Stress points 45: #Social
 
 
WORKOUT DESIGNER
 
Matt Rowe is the founder of Rowe & King Coaching (www.roweandking.com) with 25 years of cycling experience, coaching amateur cyclists all over the world to  achieve their personal goals.
 
HELPFUL HINT
 
We highly recommend doing one of the FTP tests as the estimated FTP can be inaccurate and make the difficulty level of the workouts too high for your current fitness level.
You can adjust the difficulty of the workout mid-ride if needed, by using the up/down arrows on the left hand side, under the workout details.
 
HAVE FUN AND ENJOY THE RIDE.

#rcc

name: Watts More Build more Watts!
description:
Watts More! Ride with friends in challenging events. Take on your challenge in Watts, elevation or duration!


At Tuesday evening we Build more Watts! We ride together on different tracks and will challenge ourselves towards the advertised average pace. Ride leaders vary and will cheer you on during this ride and will put some nice surprises in. All riders are encouraged to keep the bunch together, so we can start and finish as one happy blob. Everybody is welcome as long as you make this a good and relaxed event.

From Oktober until May there is a rideleader. From June until September we choose challenging routes for you. 

Check out our weekly ride announcements on the Watts More Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/1151203888657006/?ref=share  

Join Watts More on Zwift  https://www.zwift.com/clubs/d6afeaa7-e754-478a-b68d-2a794648fa02/home

More Watts More events: 

Different Watts! (D) 2.2-2.4 W/kg, Thursday 19.00 CET 
Rendurance! (C) 2.2-2.6 W/kg, Saturday 9.00 AM CET
To the Top! (C) 2.5-3.0 W/kg, Sunday 9.00 AM CET

name: ZTPL Cycling Club Chase Ride
description:
Zapraszamy na wspólny event z ZTPL Cycling Club.
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka!

Tym razem pobawimy się w kotka i myszkę. Startujemy najpierw grupą D, za nią grupa C a na końcu grupa B.

Zadaniem jest dojechanie całej grupy do mety jako pierwsza :)
Liczyć się zatem będzie doskonała współpraca oraz komunikacja.
Pamiętajcie, im Was więcej w grupie, tym peleton napędza się i jedzie szybciej.
Równe tempo to podstawa!

Każda z grup wystartuje z pewnym zapasem czasowym, postaramy się wyliczyć tak odstępy czasowe oraz dobrać trasę, aby pogoń oraz ucieczka trwała do samej mety :)

◾️ Wartości podane w opisach dotyczą średniego tempa z CAŁEJ jazdy (nie uwzględniają interwałów, które mogą wystąpić podczas np. podjazdów)
◾️ PAMIĘTAJCIE że podczas jazd grupowych NIE UŻYWAMY ROWERÓW CZASOWYCH!
◾️ Proszę słuchajcie poleceń lidera, które podczas jazdy wyświetlane są na środku ekranu.
◾️ Lider, który prowadzi grupę podświetlony jest na żółto.
◾️ Starajcie się jechać blisko lidera, który będzie nadawał tempo

👉Podoba się Wam to co robimy? Zawsze możecie postawić Waszym kochanym administratorom oraz liderom naszych jazd wirtualną kawę :) https://buycoffee.to/ztplcc

[ENG]
We would like to invite you to ZTPL Cycling Club Coffee Ride.
This time we will play cat and mouse.
We start first with group D, then group C and finally group B.

The task is to reach the finish line first :)
Therefore, perfect cooperation and communication will be what counts.
Remember, the more of you in the group, the faster the peloton goes.
Steady pace is essential!

Each group will start with a certain amount of time, we will try to calculate the time intervals and choose the route so that the chase and the escape will continue until the very finish :)

eventSubgroups.name: ZTPL Cycling Club Chase Ride (C)
eventSubgroups.description:
Zapraszamy na wspólny event z ZTPL Cycling Club.
Tym razem pobawimy się w kotka i myszkę.
Startujemy najpierw grupą D, za nią grupa C a na końcu grupa B.

Zadaniem jest dojechanie całej grupy do mety jako pierwsza :)
Liczyć się zatem będzie doskonała współpraca oraz komunikacja.
Pamiętajcie, im Was więcej w grupie, tym peleton napędza się i jedzie szybciej.
Równe tempo to podstawa!

Każda z grup wystartuje z pewnym zapasem czasowym, postaramy się wyliczyć tak odstępy czasowe oraz dobrać trasę, aby pogoń oraz ucieczka trwała do samej mety :)

◾️ Wartości podane w opisach dotyczą średniego tempa z CAŁEJ jazdy (nie uwzględniają interwałów, które mogą wystąpić podczas np. podjazdów)
◾️ PAMIĘTAJCIE że podczas jazd grupowych NIE UŻYWAMY ROWERÓW CZASOWYCH!
◾️ Proszę słuchajcie poleceń lidera, które podczas jazdy wyświetlane są na środku ekranu.
◾️ Lider, który prowadzi grupę podświetlony jest na żółto.
◾️ Starajcie się jechać blisko lidera, który będzie nadawał tempo

◾️ Jeśli chcecie sprawić sobie naszą teamową koszulkę ZTPL Cycling Club to będzie szansa podczas kolejnego Pre-Ordera, więcej informacji znajdziecie na http://ztpl.cc/stroje-ztpl-cc/

◾️ Dodatkowo jeśli podczas tego eventu zauważyłeś coś co wymaga zmiany, masz pomysł na jego ulepszenie lub byłeś świadkiem niepożądanego zachowania, daj nam znać, zobaczymy co da się zrobić. #RideOn ZTPL Cycling Club

Zapraszamy na naszą stronę internetową www.ztpl.cc lub facebooka www.facebook.com/ZwiftPolska/ oraz www.facebook.com/groups/zwift.polska

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: TEAM ITALY HIGH INTENSITY AND STRENGTH INCREASE WORKOUT SERIES by Ferroni
description:
Welcome all to our Workout Series promoted by Team Italy. This series is structured into 10 appointments and we aim to train the energy system, aerobic, anaerobic, lactate, strength, resistance, fartlek, medium and medium-high.It's essential to know exactly your FTP value, to perfectly train all of them.  It's higly recommended a good hidratation during the workout, drink at least every 10 minutes, and respect  your recovery time. This Workout Series is perfect for your outdoor season. You will unlock the team Italy jersey when you finish the ride.
Please, add tag [ITA] after your name.
Join us into the Team Italy's Discord Channel https://discord.gg/c7PGKGv
This is the Facebook group of Team Italy https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly and Strava Club of Team Italy https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwift_italy
Join us! Have fun! Ride On! #jerseyunlock #teamitaly

name: NonStop Madrid-Lisboa Race Day
description:
EVENTOS NON STOP MADRID – LISBOA RACE DAY
Bienvenidos a NON STOP MADRID – LISBOA RACE DAY
Esta CARRERA es ofrecida por el evento por etapas de MTB NON STOP MADRID - LISBOA para que puedas superarte día a día. Una carrera de BTT que te permitirá vivir una aventura de 700 km desde Madrid a Lisboa.
Espera una CARRERA montañosa y competitiva en todas las CATs. Para que la carrera sea lo más justa posible, los corredores que utilicen zPower, que carezcan de monitores de frecuencia cardíaca, que pedaleen en una categoría inapropiada o que pedaleen de manera poco realista pueden ser descalificados.
Los resultados finales estarán disponibles en zwiftpower.com. Esperamos que todos los participantes disfruten de la CARRERA, realicen un ENTRENAMIENTO de calidad y tengan la oportunidad de sentir los valores AVENTUREROS del NON STOP MADRID - LISBOA.
Si deseas obtener más información sobre el evento, síguenos en nuestra cuenta de Instagram https://www.instagram.com/nonstopmadridlisboa/ y echa un vistazo a nuestro sitio web shorturl.at/irNRW.
Un desafío increíble para los amantes de la bicicleta de montaña. Más de 700kms en una aventura que te dejará sin palabras. #NonStopMadridLisboa #rideon #RideMtbRaces #AbrazaLaAdventura

CATEGORIAS

Grupo A: 4.0-5.0 w/kg
Grupo B: 3.2-3.9 w/kg
Grupo C: 2.5-3.1 w/kg
Grupo D: 1.0-2.49 w/kg
Grupo E: categoría femenina 1.0-5.0 w/kg


Welcome to NON STOP MADRID – LISBOA RACE DAY
 
This RACE is offered by the MTB NON STOP MADRID - LISBON stage event to help you improve yourself day by day. A mountain bike race that will allow you to live a 700 km adventure from Madrid to Lisbon.

Expect a competitive, hilly RACE in all CATs. To keep the race as fair as possible, riders using zPower, lacking heart rate monitors, riding in an inappropriate category, or riding unrealistically may be disqualified.

Final results will be available on zwiftpower.com. We hope that all participants enjoy the RACE, do a quality TRAINING and have the opportunity to feel the ADVENTURER values ​​of NON STOP MADRID - LISBON.

For more information about the event, follow us on our Instagram account https://www.instagram.com/nonstopmadridlisboa/ and take a look at our website shorturl.at/xCKNV.

An incredible challenge for mountain bike lovers. More than 700kms in an adventure journey that will leave you speechless. #NonStopMadridLisboa #rideon #RideMtbRaces #EmbraceAdventure

name: Stage 6a: Zwift Games: Epiloch | Women Only
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: Iceni Women's Series X Femme Cycle Collab
description:
Iceni Women’s Series
X
World Tour Spring Classics 

Get ready to unleash your racing fire with the Iceni Women’s Spring Classics Series, a fierce high-intensity tribute to women in cycling, staged on Zwift and inspired by the legendary WorldTour Spring Classics. Each race mimics the demands of iconic IRL classics, from relentless tempo to all-out attacks, delivering a true test of strength, strategy, and resilience.
This series is more than just racing,  it is a tribute to women.
Held during Women’s History Month, the Iceni Women’s Spring Classics Series honours the women who paved the way in sport, the pioneers who fought for opportunity, and the riders who continue to redefine what’s possible on the world’s biggest stages. Inspired by the Iceni tribe and their fearless leader, Queen Boudicca, the series celebrates courage, unity, and the unbreakable spirit of women.
Ride the virtual roads with purpose. Embrace the grit of the classics. Whether you’re racing for the win or pushing beyond your limits, this is your moment to be part of something bigger than the result.
Join the tribe.
Ride for history.
Rebel with power.


Tour of Flanders // Challenge 5 
Watopia – Coast to Coast  ( 1 lap ) 
(https://zwiftinsider.com/route/coast-to-coast/) 
Distance: 26.7 km | Elevation: 154 m
Power-ups: AERO and Ghost 
The final race of the Iceni Women’s Spring Classics series celebrates the grit and glory of Tour of Flanders steep, punchy climbs, cobbled sections, and a race where every move counts. Set on Zwift’s Coast to Coast route, this challenge brings the spirit of Flanders’ iconic roads to life, delivering a dramatic and unforgettable finale for Women’s History Month.
Riders will tackle repeated climbs and technical sections that demand power, timing, and tactical awareness. Positioning is crucial, attacks are relentless, and the finish rewards those who can combine strength with savvy race craft. It’s a fitting tribute to the women who have shaped cycling history and continue to inspire the next generation of racers.
Steep. Strategic. Unstoppable.
The perfect way to close the series ride with purpose, honor the legacy, and finish strong.
Sprint & QOM Segments (FAL)
Sasquatch Sprint 
Woodland Sprint 
Jarvis QOM
Jarvis Sprint 
Points Scoring  : 
1st - 10 points
2nd - 8 points
3rd - 6 points
4th - 4 points
5th - 2 points
6th - 1 point 
Finishing points: 
The top five score 100, 95, 90, 86, 83, and every place after that drops by 1 point.

name: Hercules -  Taco Track Tuesday
description:
Join our Taco Tuesday Track Session- a super friendly and inclusive track speed session on Zwift!

Please ensure that your 5K time is up-to-date on your Zwift profile. This will ensure you get the most out of the workout, but you also have the option to change the percentage on the app whilst running. 

You can walk, jog or race, everyone is welcome.

Expect great chat, good vibes, and a welcoming atmosphere for all runners, whether you're new to Zwift or a seasoned pro.

Please join our Zwift Club at https://www.zwift.com/uk/clubs/d6581e47-deb2-46ed-a278-5777d5d2fd0f/home

Please join our Facebook Group at https://www.facebook.com/groups/2606407819659263/

Please join us online at https://herculesrunningandtri.com/

Please join us on Strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/herculesrunningandtriclub

If you would like to own our famous Pink & Black Club Kit in real life, please order at https://tinyurl.com/herculestrirun

name: Team Italy Fat Burn Ride
description:
Welcome riders to our Fat Burn Ride

This ride aim to be a Fat Burn ride for D rider category - Z1 for other rider category riders

The rhythm will be 1,6/2wkg, please follow the Leader instructions during the ride, the fence will be the killer one.
